lsp session.jsonl
stdout '"renameProvider":{"prepareProvider":true}'
stdout '"codeLensProvider":{}'
stdout '"inlayHintProvider":true'
stdout '"title":"Create missing heading target"'
stdout '"title":"Extract link to reference definition"'
stdout '"title":"Remove unused reference definitions"'
stdout '"title":"Remove duplicate reference definitions"'
stdout '"newText":"Experiment Variant"'
stdout 'references'
stdout '"label":"'
stdout 'objects/t6.md'

-- session.jsonl --
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"rootPath":"${WORK}"}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"workspace/didChangeWatchedFiles","params":{"changes":[{"uri":"file://${WORK}/00-object-catalog.md","type":2}]}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"textDocument/didOpen","params":{"textDocument":{"uri":"file://${WORK}/source.md","languageId":"markdown","version":1,"text":"See [bad](target.md#missing).\n\n[unused]: target.md\n[dup]: target.md\n[dup]: other.md\n"}}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"textDocument/codeAction","params":{"textDocument":{"uri":"file://${WORK}/source.md"},"range":{"start":{"line":0,"character":0},"end":{"line":0,"character":0}},"context":{"diagnostics":[{"range":{"start":{"line":0,"character":4},"end":{"line":0,"character":29}},"severity":2,"code":"link-heading","source":"openspec","message":"missing markdown heading target"}]}}}

{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"exit"}

-- 00-object-catalog.md --
# Catalog

| Object | One-line definition | Domain | Status |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Variant** | Alternate. | variants | current |

## Variant   `status: current`
